product_overview: A personal frontend portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, achievements and a real-time analytics dashboard. The site prioritizes responsive navigation, polished animations, accessibility, and support for English and Indonesian localization.
core_goals: Provide seamless, responsive navigation across desktop and mobile breakpoints using a floating sidebar and collapsed mobile menu
Deliver smooth route transitions and entrance animations (Framer Motion & GSAP) without layout shifts or UI freezes
Implement interactive visual elements (3D skill grid, SpotlightCard) with physics-based hover behavior and accurate cursor tracking
Support localisation (English and Indonesian) with instant UI text updates
Render a real-time analytics dashboard that fetches Umami data and visualizes it with Recharts
Allow users to download a Resume/CV file reliably
Ensure production deployment on Vercel with CDN-delivered assets and robust handling of missing asset scenarios

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Navigate between portfolio sections via a floating sidebar on desktop and a collapsed mobile menu; links update the route and render the target page.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click on navigation link to /projects -> See /projects page content
Navigate to / -> Click on navigation link to /dashboard -> See /dashboard page content
Navigate to / -> Click on collapsed mobile menu toggle -> Click on navigation link to /contact -> See /contact page content
Navigate to / -> Click on navigation link to /about -> Click has no effect -> See URL remains unchanged and current page still displayed (navigation failure)

features.name: View Portfolio Pages
features.description: View site pages (Home, About, Achievements, Projects, Dashboard, Contact) and interact with page UI elements such as buttons and cards.
user_flows: Navigate to /projects -> Scroll through project list -> Click a project card -> See project details or expanded card content
Navigate to /about -> Scroll through skills and biography content -> Interact with a UI button or card -> See the expected UI response
Navigate to /achievements -> Scroll through achievements list -> Images and text load correctly
Navigate to /projects -> Scroll through project list -> Click a UI element -> See no response or broken image resource (UI interaction error)

features.name: Responsive Floating Sidebar & Mobile Menu
features.description: Desktop shows a floating sidebar for navigation; mobile shows a collapsed/expandable navigation menu. Routing must work across breakpoints.
user_flows: Set viewport to desktop -> Navigate to / -> See floating sidebar visible -> Click a sidebar link to /about -> See /about page
Set viewport to mobile -> Navigate to / -> Click mobile menu toggle -> Click link to /contact -> See /contact page
Set viewport to mobile -> Click mobile menu toggle -> Menu fails to expand -> See links not accessible (menu failure)

features.name: Dark Mode & Aesthetics
features.description: The default theme is dark mode with glassmorphism effects and gradient orb backgrounds; theme rendering must not obscure text or break layout.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe dark mode theme active with glassmorphism and gradient background
Navigate to / -> Click theme toggle control -> See theme switch to light mode and UI updates accordingly
Navigate to / -> Click theme toggle control -> See text contrast becomes unreadable or layout breaks after theme change (theme rendering error)

features.name: Page Transitions (Framer Motion)
features.description: Shared element and route transition animations using Framer Motion should be smooth between route changes without freezing UI or causing layout shifts.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click on navigation link to /about -> See smooth page transition animation between routes
Navigate to / -> Click on navigation link to /projects -> See shared element animation for any matching elements
Navigate to / -> Click on navigation link to /about -> See abrupt layout shift or frozen UI during transition (transition failure)

features.name: Entrance Animations (GSAP)
features.description: Homepage entrance animations should cascade sequentially on initial render using GSAP.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe homepage loads -> See elements animate sequentially in the entrance sequence
Reload / -> Observe page load -> See elements render without entrance animation or appear simultaneously (animation missing)

features.name: 3D Skill Icon Grid
features.description: A 3D grid of skill icons that uses spring physics and hover effects; hovering should trigger physics-based movement.
user_flows: Navigate to /about -> Scroll to skills section -> Hover over a skill icon -> See 3D spring movement and hover effect on the icon
Navigate to /about -> Hover over multiple icons in sequence -> See stable physics-based interactions without layout shifts
Navigate to /about -> Hover over a skill icon -> See no movement or jittery/jumping behavior (physics interaction error)

features.name: SpotlightCard (Mouse-following Radial Glow)
features.description: Certain cards feature a radial glow that follows the cursor position; the glow must track the cursor accurately within card bounds.
user_flows: Navigate to /projects -> Scroll to a SpotlightCard -> Move cursor inside the card bounds -> See radial glow follow cursor position within the card
Navigate to /projects -> Enter and move cursor across card -> See glow update smoothly without leaving card bounds
Navigate to /projects -> Move cursor inside SpotlightCard -> See glow lag behind cursor or extend outside card boundary (spotlight effect error)

features.name: Localisation (i18n)
features.description: Support for English and Indonesian; toggling language must instantly translate static UI text.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click language switch control -> See UI text update instantly to Indonesian
Navigate to /projects -> Click language switch control -> See project labels and UI strings update to the selected language
Navigate to / -> Click language switch control -> See partial translation or untranslated strings remain (i18n coverage error)

features.name: Analytics Dashboard (Umami + Recharts)
features.description: A real-time dashboard that fetches analytics data from the Umami API and renders charts with Recharts.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> App issues API request to Umami -> See charts render populated with fetched data
Navigate to /dashboard -> App displays loading state while fetching -> See charts appear when data returns
Navigate to /dashboard -> Umami API returns error or 500 -> See an error state and empty/placeholder charts (API error handling)

features.name: Resume/CV Download
features.description: A button to download the Resume/CV file; clicking must trigger a reliable file download.
user_flows: Navigate to /contact -> Locate Resume/CV download button -> Click Resume/CV download button -> Browser starts downloading resume file
Navigate to /about -> Click Resume/CV download button -> See file download dialog and saved resume file
Navigate to /contact -> Click Resume/CV download button -> Server returns 404 or network error -> See download fail or browser shows error (download failure)

features.name: Deployment & Asset Delivery (Vercel/CDN)
features.description: The app is deployed on Vercel; tests should validate CDN-served assets, acceptable load times, and graceful handling of missing assets.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Browser requests JS/CSS/assets from CDN -> See page assets served and page loads within acceptable time
Navigate to / -> Subsequent navigation to /projects loads quickly via cached CDN assets -> See smooth user experience
Navigate to / -> CDN returns missing asset or 404 -> See broken styles or missing images on the page (asset delivery error)

features.name: Navigation
user_interactions: Click on navigation links to switch pages

features.name: View Portfolio Pages
features.description: View various content pages of the portfolio
user_interactions: Interact with UI elements like buttons and cards
